column1: # Tok Pisin (tpi) book names and abbreviations for biblelib
# Conventions: Baibel long Tok Pisin, Bible Society of Papua New Guinea (BSPNG, 1989)
# OT uses descriptive Tok Pisin names where established; transliterations elsewhere
# Abbreviations: derived from Tok Pisin name; no published standard exists
# Deuterocanonical and extended canon: transliterated (BSPNG is Protestant only)
